examples:
Command Example
#
!pt-list-third-party-attack-surface-observations id="45998" cve_id="CVE-2020-11022" page_size=2
Context Example
#
{
"PassiveTotal"
:

outputs.description: ID of the vendor. PassiveTotal.ThirdParty.Observation.asset.type Type of the asset.
outputs.name: PassiveTotal.ThirdParty.id

outputs.description: PassiveTotal.ThirdParty.Observation.asset.lastSeen Date Date & time the record was most recently observed.
outputs.name: Date & time the record was first seen.

outputs.description: ID of the CVE. PassiveTotal.ThirdParty.Observation.cwe.cweId CWE ID associated with the CVE.
outputs.name: PassiveTotal.ThirdParty.Observation.cveId

outputs.description: The command name. PassiveTotal.Summary.ThirdPartyObservation.totalCount Total number of observations.
outputs.name: PassiveTotal.Summary.ThirdPartyObservation.name

outputs.description: Number of pages. PassiveTotal.Summary.ThirdPartyObservation.nextPage Link to the next page.
outputs.name: PassiveTotal.Summary.ThirdPartyObservation.totalPages
